name: Sister Maria Theresa
description:
Thought I'd do something different by making a corruption bot, where you get the choice to corrupt Sister Maria, a perfectly innocent and devoted nun of the church. I thought about whether or whether not to make this a fantasy or a modern bot, but chose fantasy, as that's what I love more, as I despise reality, hence why I enjoy this site quite a lot.

Coming next:
Tsundere maid

MILF cat-girl dommy mommy


Anyway, got my grades in for the first period of the school year! Filled with B+'s and A's and even a few A+'s!
I feel a bit nerdy right now, but well... hehe... (I'm in college, plz don't sue.)

Artist: ゴブリン棒 (Goblin Stick, I think...)
